commands.repair_reason: This PR needs maintainer review for the session-routing upgrade impact, but there is no confirmed narrow code defect for a repair lane.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the diff touches Telegram routing helpers and tests without changing dependencies, workflows, secrets handling, or install scripts. (sha=8e91dd70c483c64dba8c87baba525c88a35e31fe)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a Telegram forum-topic hint from supergroup `is_topic_message` to forum resolution call sites and regression tests for routing when `chat.is_forum` is omitted.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main already uses `is_topic_message` in the sequential lane but later `resolveTelegramForumFlag` ignores it and can return false when `chat.is_forum` is absent and `getChat` is unavailable or fails.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs maintainer review for the session-routing upgrade impact, but there is no confirmed narrow code defect for a repair lane.
